content.text:
You're currently set to the TopEmployeesTable layout area in the Northwind/Analytics catalog, filtered for 2024 and European employees (all months).

If you're still seeing the "Top Employees of the Month" report, it likely means the application page didn't refresh the displayed view. I can do one of the following to update what you see:
- Explicitly display the TopEmployeesTable layout area now (recommended)
- Display TopEmployees (chart) or TopEmployeesReport instead
- Refresh the Dashboard where the monthly "Top Employees of the Month" report is shown

Which would you like me to display?
